1651.reason: [When encountering a single '|', it should not be treated as a valid OR token (which represents "||"). Instead, it should yield Type.UNKNOWN to prevent further processing as a valid token, since single '|' is an error.]

1654.reason: [When encountering a single '&', it should not be treated as a valid AND token (which represents "&&"). Instead, it should yield Type.UNKNOWN to prevent further processing as a valid token, since single '&' is an error.]
